name: GF Hong Kong Stock Through Hang Seng Comprehensive Mid-cap Equity Index Fund (LOF)
summary: GF Hong Kong Stock Through Hang Seng Comprehensive Mid-cap Equity Index Fund (LOF) is a fund managed by GF Fund Management that invests in Hong Kong-listed stocks through the China Stock Connect program, tracking the Hang Seng Comprehensive Mid-cap Equity Index. It is a Listed Open-Ended Fund (LOF), allowing it to be traded on the stock exchange.
